loc:
• Rameshwar Vaibhav Hill Station is situated at Village Tadgaon, Taluka Sudhagad, District Raigad, Maharashtra
• Located in the eastern ranges of Sahyadri mountains at a height of 1675 ft. above sea level
• Mumbai - 104 kms (via Atal Setu 70 kms)
• Navi Mumbai International Airport (NMIA) - 55 km
• Panvel - 40 km
• Khalapur Toll plaza - 38 km
• Khopoli - Pali Road (National Highway NH548A) - 12 km
name: 1000+ acres N.A. Land for Hill Station on sale near Khopoli
label: Price
suitableFor: Hill-station and mixed-use development on the lines of Lake City - townships, resort communities, premium villas and second homes (similar to Lavasa and Amby Valley)
opportunity:
• Declared by State Government as a hill station & a high priority tourist destination
• Project is surrounded by dense forest
• Land pattern is a mix of hilly as well table land
• Pristine natural beauty providing a much needed relief away from the noise, traffic & city pollution
• Optical fibre cables laid at the site with an operational telephone exchange nearby
• Water is available through out the year through natural springs
• Tar road is constructed
• Red soil at site
keyPoints: Surrounded by 10,000 Acres of Reserve Forest
Hill Station Approval as per Government GR (similar to Lavasa and Amby Valley)
Daily State Transport Bus Service from Pen and Khopoli Station
Bank Valuation & Title Report from Yardi Prabhu
specialFeatures:
Famous picnic spots nearby:
• Imagica Amusement & Water Park
• Ballaleshwar Ganpati Temple (Ashta Vinayayak) at Pali
• Saras Gadh Fort - A popular spot for Trekking and Rock Climbing
• Archaeologically beautiful temple of "Lord Rameshwar"
• Uddhar Rameshwar Temple
• Unhere Hot Water Springs
comments:
Approvals for the project;
• Asst. Director Town Planning, Raigad under Resolution No. NA/SNO/-13 to 114 SS-A/3930 dated 15th December 1986, Town Planning Department, Government of Maharashtra
• Tahasildar, Sudhagad, District - Raigad, Revenue Department. Government of Maharashtra, under Resolution No. NA/SR/360, dated 19th December 1986
• The Sarpanch, Group Gram Panchayat, Tadgaon, District Raigad under Resolution number 123 dated 30th November 1985
• Maharashtra Tourism Development Corporation Ltd. Under Resolution No. MTDC / DEV / RAIGAD - 776 dated 13th September 1986
• No Objection Certificate (N.O.C.) granted by District Health Office, Raigad Zilla Parishad.
• Executive Engineer, Mahad (Public Works Department, Mahad)
• Executive Engineer, Raigad Zilla Parishad, Government of Maharashtra.
• Maharashtra Electricity Board.
• Superintendent of Police, District Raigad.
• Foreign Investment Promotion Board (FIPB) and Cabinet Committee on Foreign Investment (CCFI) allowing foreign direct Investment in this Mixed Use Infrastructure Project
snapshot: Government-approved hill station - 1160 acres NA land, ringed by ~10,000 acres of reserve forest.
1675 ft above sea level - strong road and rail connectivity to Mumbai, Khopoli and NMIA.

location.address: Rameshwar Vaibhav Hill Station, Village Tadgaon, Taluka Sudhagad, District Raigad, Maharashtra
